> >Release:        FreeBSD 2.2-STABLE i386
> >Environment:
> 
> 	
> 
> Micron PPro 180, 64M Core , FreeBSD-Stable, Using onboard IDE
> controller/floppy controller, single 3.5" floppy drive controller detected
> as a NEC72065B
> 
> >Description:
> 
> 	
> 
> fdformat fails also reading from a floppy occassionaly fails
> message: hard error reading isbn xx of xxxxxx is generated on the console
> 
> this error is not isolated to this computer I have heard of other people
> having it (fdformat will work in 2.1.5 but not 2.2)
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> 	
> 
> run fdformat on my machine with any floppy disk
> 
> 
> >Fix:
> 	
> 	
> 
> transfer relevant files to a windoze machine to rawrite images copy files
> on disk etc.

Another fix might be to use the raw device (i. e. /dev/rfd0) instead
of the block device (i. e. fd0) as argument to fdformat.

> >Audit-Trail:
> >Unformatted:
